title: Session Type State Spaces Form Lattices — companion artifact
description: Code-and-data companion to the ICE 2026 paper "Session Type State Spaces Form Lattices" (published separately). Contains the Lean 4 mechanisation of the Reticulate Theorem (zero sorry, no coinduction), the Python reticulate lattice checker, and the 86 §2.1-conformant protocol benchmarks. Assembled from the curated public bica-tools components; scoped to the paper's headline result. The paper is not included here; see the related identifier.
notes: The paper's auxiliary mechanised results (duality, width-subtyping embedding, realisable fragment, divergent-recursion counterexample) and the Java BICA Reborn checker are distributed separately; this record ships the import closure of the headline theorem reticulate_lattice.
